items.title: Salesforce CodeGen Tutorial: Generate, Validate, and Rerank Python Functions With Unit Tests and Safety Checks
items.summary: We implement an end-to-end workflow for Salesforce CodeGen, loaded from Hugging Face. We move past basic inference by adding function extraction, syntax checking, static safety checks, and unit-test validation. We rerank best-of-N candidates,...
